events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the observed condition is an unbonded CSST gas line at rough-in — a code violation of NEC 250.104(B)/250.30, since CSST's thin corrugated wall is prone to arc puncture from lightning-induced or fault current without a proper bonding jumper to the grounding electrode system. Marked `decision: fail`, `risk: high`, with corrective actions to install and verify the bonding jumper before closeout.
